title: El PIB de la zona euro se contrae un 0,2% en el primer trimestre de 2026 por el impacto de la guerra de Irán
summary: La economía europea se contrajo un 0,2% en los tres primeros meses de 2026 fruto del impacto de la guerra de EEUU e Irán, la primera contracción desde 2022 y la mayor desde 2020. El empleo sube un 0,1% en la zona euro y se mantiene estable en la Unión. Leer

title: Europa tiene que ser circular,  o no podrá ser competitiva
summary: Un marco regulatorio estable, un mercado único de materiales secundarios, colaboración entre empresas y Administraciones e innovación, imprescindibles para una circularidad competitiva. Leer

summary: La Generalitat catalana y la Junta andaluza reciben 30.000 millones cada una de las transferencias aprobadas por el Gobierno frente a los 22.000 de Madrid o los 15.000 de la Comunidad Valenciana. Leer

title: Concerns raised over air passenger rights in Europe as crunch talks continue
summary: Concerns are mounting at a controversial revision of Europe's air passenger rights, as crunch talks between European Parliament and Council negotiators are expected to continue next week ahead of a June 15th deadline.

title: Today in Spain: A roundup of the latest news on Friday
summary: Spain's millionaire population hits 260,000, Spanish PM to join pope at migrant meeting in Canary Islands, 6 in 10 young Spaniards believe they won't progress in life and more news on Friday June 5th.

title: What's the law on Ozempic for weight loss in Spain?
summary: Ozempic has quickly become the world's most popular off-label weight loss drug - but can people in Spain get their hands on it without a medical prescription and if they don't have diabetes? Here's what the law says.

title: What’s the difference between a gestor, a lawyer and a notary in Spain?
summary: It’s impossible to live in Spain and not have to deal with its often frustrating bureaucracy, and for that you’ll usually need professional help. So for which official matters should you hire a gestor, a lawyer or a notary? What can they do and not do?

title: Spain posts record number of heat-related deaths in May
summary: The deaths of 101 people in Spain in May were heat-related, the highest number for the month since such records started being kept in 2015, the Spanish health ministry has said.

title: Spain starts work on 2027 budget after years of parliamentary deadlock
summary: Spain's prime minister said Wednesday that his government has begun work on a 2027 budget, effectively shelving hopes of passing a spending plan for this year as his minority administration struggles to secure parliamentary support.
